description: Fix bugs in the plugin SDK: safeSerializeArg crashes on SVG elements and non-DOM objects with nodeType property, and retry() throws undefined when maxAttempts is 0 or NaN.

userStories.title: Fix safeSerializeArg crash on SVG elements and objects with nodeType
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want log.info/error/etc. to never crash even when passed SVG DOM nodes or arbitrary objects with a nodeType property, so that the 'safe serializer' contract is upheld.
acceptanceCriteria: Logging an SVG element (where className is SVGAnimatedString) does not throw and produces a reasonable string representation like '[svg#myId]'
Logging a non-DOM object like { nodeType: 1, className: 42 } does not throw and falls through to the JSON serialization path
Logging a normal HTML element still works as before (e.g., '[DIV#myId.myClass]')
The safeSerializeArg function never throws for any input type
Unit tests cover SVG elements, objects with numeric nodeType, and normal HTML elements
npm run build passes
npm run type-check passes
npm run lint passes
npm run knip passes
npm run test passes

userStories.title: Fix retry() throwing undefined when maxAttempts is 0 or NaN
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want retry() to throw a proper Error when called with invalid maxAttempts, so that downstream catch handlers don't crash with a secondary TypeError.
acceptanceCriteria: retry({ maxAttempts: 0 }) throws an Error with a descriptive message (not undefined)
retry({ maxAttempts: NaN }) throws an Error with a descriptive message (not undefined)
retry({ maxAttempts: -1 }) throws an Error with a descriptive message (not undefined)
retry({ maxAttempts: Infinity }) throws an Error with a descriptive message (not undefined) — infinite loops are prevented
retry({ maxAttempts: 1 }) still works correctly (single attempt, no retry)
retry() with no options still defaults to 3 attempts
Unit tests cover all edge cases
npm run build passes
npm run type-check passes
npm run lint passes
npm run knip passes
npm run test passes
